local_runtime_observations.memray_reason: pixi.toml declares memray only when sys_platform != 'win32'

external_gates.notes: The full test suite now passes in the local venv and the validation artifact is recorded under artifacts/track19/.
Sample fixtures, synthetic micro-runs, and benchmark JSON do not satisfy this gate. The profiled input must be at least 1 GiB of Hansard/legal corpus data.
On this Windows workspace Memray is not installed by Pixi because the dependency is Linux/macOS-gated; satisfying this gate requires a supported runtime or adjusted platform plan.
This is separate from the 1 GiB minimum profile gate and requires the canonical full corpus, not bundled sample files.

local_validation.name: focused Track 19 evidence and benchmark tests
local_validation.command: pixi run python -B -m pytest -p no:cacheprovider -q tests\test_track19_evidence.py tests\benchmarks\test_pipeline_benchmark.py --benchmark-json artifacts\track19\benchmark_20260624.json --basetemp C:\tmp\nlp-track19-final-20260624

local_validation.name: Track 19 lint
local_validation.command: pixi run python -m ruff check --no-cache src\nlp_policy_nz\telemetry\evidence.py tests\test_track19_evidence.py tests\benchmarks\test_pipeline_benchmark.py tests\test_track19_external_gate_manifest.py
